steps.title: Match the appositive marks
steps.content: The phrase the cellular organs that generate energy from light renames chloroplasts. Since the appositive closes with an em dash, it needs a matching opening em dash after chloroplasts.

steps.title: Compare the punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses a semicolon; Choice B gives no boundary; Choice C opens with a comma that mismatches the closing dash. Choice D supplies the matching em dash. The answer is D.
